description: Generate a publication-quality scientific schematic from a natural-language description via the OpenRouter image API (Nano Banana 2), with a smart iterative Gemini quality review keyed to the target document type.
rules: requires OPENROUTER_API_KEY (secret) — the core exits 1 without it
requires the requests library and outbound network to https://openrouter.ai
DOC_TYPE picks the quality threshold (journal/conference/poster/presentation/report/grant/thesis/preprint/default); max 2 refinement iterations
writes the final PNG plus per-iteration images and a *_review_log.json under record_store/figures
usage: Set PROMPT (the diagram description) and optionally DOC_TYPE (default: default). Export OPENROUTER_API_KEY. Output: figures/schematic.png and a review log.
limitation: Not offline-capable: needs a network, an OPENROUTER_API_KEY, and the requests package. With any of those absent the porter still emits a status sidecar but no real image. Image content is non-deterministic.

vars.PROMPT: Evaluation framework decision tree for ScholarEval dimensions
